name: normal
prompts: Build a CRM with login, dashboard, role-based access, contacts management, and Stripe payments.
Create an e-commerce store with product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, and admin inventory panel.
Build a project management SaaS with tasks, teams, kanban boards, and email notifications.
Create a blog platform with posts, comments, categories, and author authentication.
Build a booking system for appointments with calendar, reminders, and customer profiles.
Create an inventory management app with warehouses, stock tracking, and supplier records.
Build a learning management system with courses, quizzes, student progress, and certificates.
Create a help desk ticketing system with agents, priorities, SLA tracking, and knowledge base.
Build a real estate listing platform with properties, agents, search filters, and favorites.
Create a fitness tracking app with workouts, goals, progress charts, and social sharing.
